transcript.text:
(How much do you plan to eat today...?) I forgot to say how many Chapagetti noodles I’ll eat
I’ll have 8 packs of Chapagetti!
(With mouthwatering Chapagetti with...)
(3 kinds of kimchi set)
(Mix it all at once)
This green onion kimchi is so big
(You must be done by now...?)
(No way) Today’s main menu!
(There’s a real main menu?!) The main menu came in too late
I will bring the main menu XX
(Let’s go see what's the real one!)
Hello, everyone
('That’s right! Our local fruit') Actually, since this summer
(Local fruit promotion with TMON!) I’m promoting our local fruits
(From this summer to now)
(Tzuyang has been working hard to promote domestic fruits)

(July 26 Peach DAY) Look at this
(August 8 Grape DAY) I prepared grapes
(October 22 Pear DAY) I prepared pears this time
(October 24 Apple Day) I'm here to promote apples
(November 4 Persimmon DAY) I prepared persimmons, it looks super sweet!
(December 1st Citrus Day)
(And finally today...)
Today is finally the seventh and the last day
Though I wasn't able to make a big impact,
I had the chance to support local farmers this year by promoting fruit
It was so worthwhile
Today’s fruit is ‘kiwi’
After eating Chapagetti
I'm going to have kiwi for dessert
(Let’s start with 'Chaggyechi'!) You know Chaggyechi, right? Chapagetti + Egg + Cheese
I’ll be eating this today!

First, I’ll start with the Chapagetti
Bon appétit!
(Overwhelming visuals...)
(Pattering)
No...!
Hold on, I originally have to mix this up
But the yolk...
(My yolk...) It's broken
Looks delicious!
(The greasy Chaggyechi looks so delicious) Looks so greasy! Chaggyechi with fried eggs
(Chapagetti + Egg + Cheese = Chaggyechi!) Mix the cheese and Chapagetti together like this
Mixed with yolk and cheese, the smell is very fragrant
(Rich Chapagetti) It looks so gooey
(I’ll give it a try hehe) Bon appétit!
(Amazing)
I can’t slurp on the noodles because it’s so gooey

I should eat like this
(Round and round)
It’s so delicious!
(Beverage is a must)
I ran out of things to drink at home today
(Today's beverage) So I will drink Gatorade
(The master’s mistake)
(I spilled it...)
(But let’s drink it...)
I almost got into trouble
I... spilled a little
(The issue has already been resolved)
On camera, I failed this...
(Unexpected 2nd mistake) only once...
I spilled it all!
(Quickly trying to make up for it) I don’t think I spilled everything

I also prepared 3 types of kimchi!
(3 kinds of kimchi set!) Green onion kimchi, cabbage kimchi, radish kimchi
(Chapagetti tastes perfect with green onion kimchi) Green onion kimchi! This is the conventional way to eat Chapagetti!
Like this!
Looks delicious
Let’s try the radish kimchi
(*This is not a Bibigo advertisement) Bibigo
Bibigo radish kimchi
(This is way too delicious) Looks delicious
(Inhaling the bowl)
I forgot to say how many Chapagetti noodles I’ll eat
I have...
8 bags of Chapagetti!
(Maximum pot capacity...) I have a big pot, and it fits 8 perfectly!
I actually prepared 10 portions of noodles
But the pot was about to overflow...

(Rejected by the pot) So I only cooked 8 of them
This is whole cabbage kimchi...
Is it too big?
(Eats it in one bite...)
Kimchi tastes so delicious
(Bouncy soft-boiled egg) One fried egg...
To this Chapagetti...
(Cover well with an egg blanket...) top it with eggs
In one bite
(Challenge)
I don't think it will fit, it’s too big
(Such an easy success...)
I barely had Chaggyechi before
(Salty and savory Chaggyechi is so charming) But it's so savory and delicious
Radish kimchi tastes so delicious
(Eggs are moving) Let’s put the eggs aside!

(Mix it thoroughly)
(It's looking good again)
(Let’s bring back the broken egg) The yolk broke! It broke at the bottom
Chapagetti tastes delicious when it is moist
Must have a lot of water...
(Empty...)
Chapagetti...
really looks amazing
(Big picture of Tzuyang) I forgot the flakes... But it’s actually better
The absence of flakes doesn’t make a difference in the taste
(Simply delicious) It tastes the same
(A chopstick full of food)
The yolk fell out like this!
(A soft-boiled egg without the yolk...) The backside had a hole
I usually buy eggs in boxes at home
But they last about a week

(Beverage killer) I think I only buy beverages every time
Green onion kimchi
(Roll roll roll roll roll)
I should cut this kimchi, it’s too big
(And here's the scissors)
(Kimchi CUT)
(The beverage is empty before you know it)
(Tzuyang is only organized when eating) This is why I also prepared Powerade
(Nom)
(Quite a wild way to open)
Why are ionic drinks so delicious nowadays?
(Found giant green onion kimchi) Is green onion kimchi originally this huge?
Aren't they originally very small?
(Last egg in one bite)
Recent mukbangs often say
a large bag of 5 is one bag, instead of the small bag

(That’s very correct) I guess that's right
One pack of Chapagetti is not enough
(A typical person’s standard) Aren’t two bags just enough? I heard that’s just right
(Memories of 20 ramyun noodles) I ate 20 ramyun bags back then...
Wouldn't it be possible for people to eat one bag per hour over the course of 4 hours?
I think the 2 bags are just right
2 large bags
I'm so excited to eat kiwi
I really like fruit
so I deliver them a lot
(Diligent hand movements)
Can't leave anything behind!
(Traces of a fierce battle)
(Silent out of deliciousness)
This cup is 900ml
Am I right...?

(Eating and eating...)
(Clean)
I’m done eating, so...
today’s main menu!
The main menu came in too late
(Coming soon) I will bring the main menu, kiwi
(December 12 Kiwi Day’s 'Kiwi') I'll cut a kiwi and try it
Kiwi is slightly under-ripe
So it tastes slightly crunchy...
But I’ll just give it a try
When the kiwi is too crunchy, wait for it to ripen before eating
(Quickly peeling off the kiwi skin...)
Maybe being underripe might just make it tasty!
(A bite to look forward to!) Let's eat!
(Impressed)
This is my first time eating crunchy kiwi that is slightly under-ripe

(Amazingly refreshing!) It's so refreshing...!
The sweetness is really just...
It’s so refreshing, so it’s more delicious!
The slightly crunchy like an apple!
'Kiwi' is rich in vitamin C and high in potassium
(Effect of potassium) 1. Potassium balances the body's water
2. And some say it helps the muscle cells
And I learned this for the first time too but
apparently kiwi
(Meat tenderization) is great for tenderizing meat!
It has a proteolytic effect
(The unfamiliar kind of kiwi) I only knew about gold kiwi and plain kiwi
Redvita kiwi is full of vitamin C
(It has no hair, so you can eat the skin) Greenmol, green mushroom, etcetera
(Sugar source 100%, high sugar Goldwin, Gamhwang) I guess there are many types!
Kiwi is just like banana

It is a fruit that is picked and eaten after it's ripened
(Must be riped at room temperature) Let it ripe at room temperature for a delicious flavor
(※ There may be exceptions) But I think this already tastes delicious!
(Enjoys the last piece of kiwi) Delicious
You can buy seasonal fruits at Hanaro Mart nationwide
And it’s now also available on TMON
You can buy seasonal fruits on Fruit Day
So everyone!
Please support and love local Korean fruits!
Thanks for the meal!
